description: Project-studio setup-flow evals. Each scenario spawns an isolated subagent that runs the first ~10 turns of setup using the updated setup-flow.md. Graders score: (a) did the agent ask Q1, Q2, (Q2b if needed), Q3 in order, (b) did it avoid out-of-context questions, (c) did it correctly resolve the scenario label.

scenarios.label: Scenario A — New + Single + Standard
scenarios.prompt: Start a new project with project-studio. I'm building a personal portfolio website from scratch, solo, over about two weeks.

scenarios.label: Scenario B — New + Multi + Standard
scenarios.prompt: New project, project-studio setup. I'm planning a SaaS product with three pieces: a marketing website, the main web app, and an iOS app. None of them exist yet.

scenarios.label: Scenario C — Existing + Single + Standard
scenarios.prompt: I have an existing Next.js project, just a single marketing website, and I want project-studio to manage it. The code is already in the current folder.

scenarios.label: Scenario D1 — Existing + Multi + No Parent + Standard
scenarios.prompt: I have two existing projects — a Next.js web app and a separate Node.js API repo. They're not coordinated anywhere yet. I want project-studio set up for the web app primarily, with context about the API.

scenarios.label: Scenario D2 — Existing + Multi + Parent Exists + Standard
scenarios.prompt: I already have a parent project-studio setup coordinating a website and an API. Now I need to add a new admin dashboard module to it. The admin code exists in a subfolder called 'admin'.

scenarios.label: Scenario A — New + Single + Light (fast-track)
scenarios.prompt: Quick light project. New landing page I want to write today, solo, just a few hours. Use project-studio.

pass_criteria: Agent asked Q1, Q2, (Q2b only if Existing+Multi), Q3 in order before any scenario work
Agent announced the correct scenario label (A/B/C/D1/D2) after Q1+Q2(+Q2b)
Agent did NOT ask the removed 'related projects (optional)' question
Agent did NOT use stale step labels (Step 1b, 1c, 1d, 8b)
Agent did NOT hallucinate out-of-context questions (e.g. asking about modules before Q2, asking parent before Q2b applies)
fail_conditions: Asked a scenario-specific question before Step 1 gate completed
Asked Q2b in a New project case
Asked related-projects menu in any scenario
Invented a scenario other than A/B/C/D1/D2
